title: ajuga ciliata var. villosior
intro: Ajuga ciliata var. villosior, also known as the hairy bugle or Ajuga villosior, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The hairy bugle is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health concerns.
